description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular wooden top with a rich, dark wood grain finish, supported by a minimalist metal frame. The front side displays a large, dark leather or faux-leather pouch or drawer, suspended from the frame with two horizontal wooden bars, giving it a modern and unique appearance. The sides reveal the pouch's flexible, hanging construction, contrasting with the rigid wood and metal elements. The back and top are solid wood, with no visible openings or hardware, emphasizing a clean, contemporary design. The metal frame is thin and angular, providing structural support while maintaining an open, airy look. This piece combines wood, metal, and leather-like materials, making it suitable for stylish urban interiors or offices.
description: A modern filing cabinet with a dark wood top, metal frame, and a large leather-like hanging drawer, blending contemporary and classic materials.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dark wood top, metal frame, and a prominent leather-like hanging drawer with horizontal wooden bars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the wooden top and the side profile of the hanging pouch within the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid wood back with no visible openings or hardware, emphasizing the cabinet's clean lines.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the hanging pouch and the supporting metal frame.
